summary: Matched a large portion of Dolphin OSExi by replacing many inline assembly stubs in src/dolphin/os/OSExi.c with typed C, adding a new public OSExi header, moving the Ecb BSS allocation from asm into C, and tightening related interrupt/time declarations. The PR body says the work was based on Prime decomp, with the caveat that OSExi had been moved to EXIBios in the Dolphin version used by Prime.
what_changed: Added include/dolphin/os/OSExi.h with EXIState, EXIChannel, EXIType, EXICallback, EXIControl, and prototypes for SetExiInterruptMask, EXIImm, EXIImmEx, EXIDma, EXISync, EXIClearInterrupts, EXISetExiCallback, EXIProbe, EXIProbeEx, EXIAttach, EXIDetach, EXISelect, EXIDeselect, EXIInit, EXILock, EXIUnlock, EXIGetState, and EXIGetID.
Reworked src/dolphin/os/OSExi.c from mostly raw inline asm and unk_t externs into typed C for many routines, while retaining assembly for hard-to-match pieces such as EXISync and EXTIntrruptHandler.
Defined EXIControl Ecb[EXI_MAX_CHAN] in C and deleted asm/dolphin/os/OSExi_data.s, which previously only allocated the Ecb BSS block.
Introduced EXI register helpers and bit-construction macros in OSExi.c, including REG_MAX, EXI_FREQ_1M, REG(chan, idx), EXI_0CR, CPR_CLK, and CPR_CS.
Added typed interrupt mask macros for EXI and PI debug interrupts in OSInterrupt.h, such as OS_INTRMASK_EXI_0_EXI, OS_INTRMASK_EXI_0_TC, OS_INTRMASK_EXI_0_EXT, and OS_INTRMASK_PI_DEBUG.
Changed __OSInterrupt from u8 to s16 and changed OSInterruptHandler and __OSSetInterruptHandler/__OSGetInterruptHandler signatures to use __OSInterrupt.
Removed OSExi_data.s.o from obj_files.mk because the Ecb data is now emitted by C.
smart_moves: Used Prime decomp as a reference source instead of treating every OSExi function as a from-scratch decompilation target, while explicitly noting the library-version wrinkle that Prime's corresponding code had moved to EXIBios.
Created a real OSExi.h before/alongside the C conversion, which made the file less dependent on unk_t externs and encoded channel/type/state/callback semantics in reusable declarations.

Preserved assembly only where still needed, instead of forcing full C conversion; EXISync remained asm with a proper BOOL EXISync(EXIChannel) signature, and EXTIntrruptHandler remained a static asm function.
Moved the Ecb BSS symbol from a standalone asm data file into a typed EXIControl Ecb[EXI_MAX_CHAN] definition, simplifying the build and making structure layout evidence explicit.
Captured repeated EXI MMIO arithmetic with REG(chan, idx) and interrupt masks with named OS_INTRMASK_* macros, reducing magic-number repetition while preserving the underlying bit operations.
decomp_lessons: When decompiling SDK subsystems, build the header/struct model early; once EXIControl fields and callback types are named, many former raw offset loads/stores become straightforward state-machine C.
Reference decomp from nearby games can be highly useful, but document version differences. Here the PR body notes that Prime's Dolphin version placed OSExi in EXIBios.

Converting an asm BSS blob to a typed C global can eliminate an asm object from the build, but only after the struct size/layout is understood; here the old Ecb allocation was 0xC0 bytes, matching three EXIControl entries of 0x40 bytes each as implied by the diff's indexed accesses.
Interrupt APIs benefit from strong typedefs and named masks. Changing handlers to take __OSInterrupt and adding OS_INTRMASK_* macros made OSExi handler setup/masking code less opaque.
Partial matching is acceptable and useful: the PR removed a large amount of assembly while leaving stubborn routines in asm with improved prototypes.
naming_conventions: EXI enums use subsystem-prefixed uppercase constants: EXI_STATE_DMA_ACCESS, EXI_STATE_IMM_ACCESS, EXI_STATE_SELECTED, EXI_STATE_ATTACHED, EXI_STATE_LOCKED, EXI_STATE_BUSY.
EXI channel enum names follow EXI_CHAN_N plus EXI_MAX_CHAN.
EXI operation types use EXI_READ, EXI_WRITE, EXI_TYPE_2, and EXI_MAX_TYPE.
Callback typedefs are subsystem-prefixed and descriptive: EXICallback.
The EXI control struct is named EXIControl and field names reflect callback/state/transfer/cache roles: exiCallback, tcCallback, extCallback, state, immLen, immBuf, dev, id, idTime, items, queue.
Interrupt mask macros use OS_INTRMASK_<source> and derive masks with 0x80000000U >> OS_INTR_*.
Internal helpers keep Dolphin-style double-underscore names where appropriate, such as __EXIProbe and __EXIAttach.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Replaced raw inline asm functions with C implementations for SetExiInterruptMask, EXIImm, EXIImmEx, EXIDma, EXIClearInterrupts, EXISetExiCallback, EXI probe/attach/select/deselect/init/lock/unlock/state/id logic, while preserving necessary low-level asm routines.
Used volatile memory-mapped register declarations at fixed addresses: __EXIRegs[EXI_MAX_CHAN][REG_MAX] at 0xCC006800 and __EXIProbeStartTime[2] at 0x800030C0.
Encoded immediate-transfer packing/unpacking in C using byte shifts like ((3 - i) * 8), mirroring the original PowerPC byte packing behavior.
Centralized EXI control register construction with EXI_0CR(tstart, dma, rw, tlen), helping match bitfield composition without scattering magic shifts.
Used named state flags such as EXI_STATE_BUSY and EXI_STATE_SELECTED to match guard conditions around OSDisableInterrupts/OSRestoreInterrupts critical sections.
Kept callback dispatch behavior explicit by clearing/setting OSContext around EXI and TC callbacks, matching SDK-style interrupt handler patterns.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: Updated and reformatted the PR, then left merge control to r-burns in case further tweaks were desired.
review_feedback.evidence: Issue comment: '@r-burns I updated and reformatted this but I'll let you merge in case you want to tweak anything.'

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that finish matching EXISync or EXTIntrruptHandler in src/dolphin/os/OSExi.c.
Search for later cleanups to the misspelled EXIIntrruptHandler and TCIntrruptHandler symbol names, if any.
Compare this OSExi.h layout against later Dolphin SDK headers or Prime EXIBios-derived declarations.
Check whether the __OSInterrupt typedef change from u8 to s16 affected other interrupt handlers in subsequent PRs.
